message: Beginning Phase 4 commit analysis. Found: 3 new systems, 2 tests, 1 test helper, docs updates.

Phase 4 commits complete. 5 commits created: TestSubscriber helper, MoveExecutionSystem, HintSystem+NoMovesDetectionSystem, UndoSystem+AutoCompleteSystem tests, docs. Remaining unstaged are agent runtime state files (.claude/heartbeat, .claude/mailbox) — intentionally not committed.
